description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its leatherette upper and elegant metal hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsLeatherette upper One zipped compartment with two zipped pockets and an organiser pouchTwo compartments on either side of the main compartment with a magnetic buttoned closuresTwo short handles with a mat design, woven through metallic embellishmentsZipped pocket on the back Graphic print on the bag for styleMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 24 cmWidth: 39 cmDepth: 9 cm
